justification: Embedded bare-CFF text at small sizes: quad-exact layout; AA-model edge redistribution as for glaive. Measured worst (2026-07-11, page 0 @100dpi, re-validated after /AP rendering landed — the form's widgets are unchecked checkboxes whose /Off states carry no appearance, so appearances add no ink on the worst page; page 1's three filled appearances improve its diff): 6.61% over d24, 14.41% over d8, mean 4.64.
